overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a rural dirt trail during golden hour. The character encounters horse-drawn carriages and riders while traversing through grassland with rocky outcrops, approaching a distant wooden cabin.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt trail through grassland with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail beside a rocky cliff face

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop formation running alongside the left side of the trail
leafless dead tree standing beside the trail
mountain range visible in the hazy background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a cowboy walking along a dirt trail through open grassland. A rocky cliff runs along the left side while a distinctive dead tree stands on the right. The sun sits low in the partly cloudy sky, casting long shadows across the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural trail with receding cliff face

events.description: horse-drawn carriage overtakes from the right and moves ahead on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as a carriage passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver overtaking and moving ahead along the trail

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a horse-drawn carriage overtakes from the right and moves ahead down the trail. The rocky cliff recedes into the distance on the left while the dead tree passes out of view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland approaching a wooden cabin

events.description: covered wagon appears ahead on the trail moving in the same direction
rider on horseback passes by heading in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking past a covered wagon and encountering a rider traveling the opposite way

notable_agents.action: covered wagon with canvas top moving along the trail ahead
rider on horseback passing by quickly in the opposite direction

entered.detail: small wooden barn or cabin with dark roof visible in the distance
large leafy oak tree beside the trail with spreading branches

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into wider grassland as a wooden cabin comes into view in the distance. The character passes a covered wagon moving ahead and encounters a rider on horseback traveling in the opposite direction. A large oak tree appears on the left while the rocky cliff fades from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching wooden cabin at trail end

events.description: second rider on horseback passes by heading in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the cabin as another rider passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback passing by quickly in the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the trail as the wooden cabin grows larger in the center of the frame. Another rider passes by on the right traveling in the opposite direction. The large oak tree recedes behind as the cabin becomes the dominant feature ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt trail that transitions from a rugged cliffside path into an open grassland centered around a distant cabin. It begins with a third-person view of a cowboy walking past a rocky cliff and a solitary dead tree under a low, golden sun. As the character advances, a horse-drawn carriage overtakes them from the right, causing the cliff and dead tree to recede as the landscape opens up. The scene then expands into wider grasslands where the character passes a covered wagon and a rider on horseback, while a large oak tree emerges on the left. Finally, the camera continues forward as another rider passes by, with the oak tree fading away as the wooden cabin grows larger to become the dominant feature of the frame.
